Tech Levels

LevelDescriptionProjectilePrimary MaterialSecondary Material
1Increase damage by 25%.Acid SporeSteel x400n/a
2Increase refire rate by 20%. One additional clone.Acid SporeSteel x800n/a
3Increase damage by 48%. Increase projectile speed by 20%.Acid SporeSteel x1600n/a
4Increase damage by 30%. Increase range by 50%. One additional clone.Acid SporeSteel x3200Hydrogen Crystal x400
5Increase damage by 42%. Increase projectile speed by 20%.Acid SporeSteel x6400Plasma Fluids x200
6Increase damage by 104%. One additional clone.Acid SporeSteel x12800Iridium x800
